opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Both my knees and my right ankle have blown up to about twice their size and they're so painful I can't stand or walk. Every time I try to crawl to the toilet my belly cramps up really badly and I've had awful watery diarrhoea since yesterday. I'm completely wiped out and I live on my own.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's all come on over the last day and tonight I just can't move — I can't get to the bathroom and I can barely keep any water down.

symptom_narrative.onset: started yesterday morning with crampy belly pain, then by the evening my knees and right ankle got hugely swollen and sore
symptom_narrative.duration: about 24 hours and it has all peaked tonight
symptom_narrative.character: colicky gripping tummy pain with lots of watery diarrhoea, and hot puffy tender swelling in both knees and the right ankle that kills when I try to bend them
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the joints are the worst part — I genuinely cannot weight-bear, and the exhaustion is crushing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: tummy (lower down, both sides), both knees, and my right ankle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started and worse tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — I took paracetamol and it did nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to move or bear weight on the joints, and moving around sets off the belly cramps

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've had Crohn's disease for years and I'm usually on a regular injection for it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a biologic injection for my Crohn's, but I missed my recent dose because of a supply problem
paracetamol from the chemist, which hasn't helped

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, is bedbound tonight because of the joint pain and exhaustion, cannot manage the walk to the bathroom and is worried about falling, and there is no one else at home to help

objective_data_offered.value: my pulse app is reading about 104 beats per minute
on video both knees and the right ankle look visibly swollen, puffy and shiny, and she winces and guards when she tries to bend them
my mouth is really dry and I've hardly been able to drink anything or keep it down
I'm still passing watery diarrhoea and wind, it hasn't stopped
empty water glasses out of reach by the bed and soiled clothing on the floor; she cannot get up to reach the bathroom
